claims.claim_text: We propose a novel approach to neural machine translation that incorporates multi-head cross-attention layers.
claims.closest_paper_title: Rosetta: Enhancing Neural Machine Translation through Multilingual-PLMs and Semantic Constraints

claims.claim_text: We demonstrate significant improvements in BLEU scores on WMT14 English-German benchmarks compared to previous methods.
claims.closest_paper_title: Comparative Analysis of Neural Machine Translation Techniques for Sanskrit-to-English Using Deep Learning and Transformer Models
